scripts.lint:fast: node ci/guards/node_version_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/tag_version_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/repo_contract.mjs && node ci/guards/no_bom_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/no_crlf_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/no_mojibake_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/lockfile_note_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/ban_engine_status_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/engine_contract_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/golden_manifest_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/golden_outputs_guard.mjs && node ci/scripts/spine_guard.mjs && node ci/scripts/sha256_guard.mjs && node ci/scripts/schema_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/registry_law_guard.mjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint:fast && npm run test:ci
scripts.ci: npm run guard:constraints && npm run guard:version && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run e2e:golden
scripts.dev:fast: npm run lint:fast && npm run test:unit
scripts.dev:check: npm run ci && npm run db:schema
scripts.dev:panic: npm run repo:clean:hard && npm ci && npm run dev:fast
scripts.engine:hello: npm run build && node dist/src/run_pipeline_cli.js examples/hello_world.json
scripts.smoke: npm run lint && npm run engine:hello
scripts.test:ci: node test/ci_ban_engine_status_guard.test.mjs && node test/ci_stable_stringify.test.mjs && node test/cli_runner_rendered_text.test.mjs && node test/phase4_rich_plan_minimum.test.mjs && node test/registry_exercise_entries.test.mjs && node test/phase6_requires_planned_items.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_fk_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_passes.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_stimulus_fk_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_equipment_fk_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_joint_stress_fk_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_equipment_scoped_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_joint_tags_missing_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_joint_tags_neutral_positive.test.mjs && node test/phase1_plate_only_collapse_negative.test.mjs
scripts.engine:contract:head: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('ENGINE_CONTRACT.md','utf8').split(/\r?\n/).slice(0,40).join('\n'); console.log(s);"
